chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Said About Those Who Fear Throwing the Pebbles or Who Add or Reduce the Number

text: 2999 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ : «وَ لاَ تَأْخُذْ مِنْ حَصَى اَلْجِمَارِ اَلَّذِي قَدْ رُمِيَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2999 - And in another narration:
"Do not take the pebbles for stoning (Rami) from those that have already been used."
